description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring the iconic Pac-Man branding. The front panel displays a yellow background with Pac-Man and ghost characters, a coin slot, and a control panel with a joystick and buttons. The side panels are decorated with large, colorful graphics of Pac-Man and a ghost, set against a yellow backdrop, with the Pac-Man logo prominently displayed. The top of the cabinet features a marquee with the Pac-Man logo in bold yellow letters on a red and black background. The rear of the cabinet is plain black, lacking any artwork or features. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood and metal, with a glass or plastic screen area and plastic controls.
description: A classic upright Pac-Man arcade cabinet with vibrant side artwork, a control panel with joystick and buttons, and a marquee displaying the Pac-Man logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with joystick and buttons, coin slot, Pac-Man and ghost graphics, and the illuminated Pac-Man marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting large Pac-Man and ghost artwork, the Pac-Man logo, and the yellow side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black back panel with no visible artwork or features.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a large Pac-Man character graphic on a yellow background, with no additional text or logos.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick and two red buttons, control panel marked with Pac-Man graphics and white directional arrows
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the Pac-Man logo in yellow with a red border on a black background, matching the game's classic theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, colorful graphics of Pac-Man and a ghost, with the Pac-Man logo and a yellow background
